name: Glass-Noodle Salad with Chicken
recipeIngredient: 1 ounce Whole chicken breast ( boned, skinned, chopped )
Salt and fresh ground black pepper to taste
2 tablespoons Nam pla ( Thai fish sauce )
Crisp fried shallots ( optional, for garnish )
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover noodles with water until soft and pliable, about 15 minutes. Drain.
2. Add noodles to a large pot of boiling water. Reduce heat to medium and cook until the noodles are plump and glass-like (2 minutes). For a crunchy texture, dip them in boiling water for 5 to 10 seconds. Drain and rinse with cold water. Chill.
3. Blanch shrimp in boiling water for 5 seconds until they curl and turn pink. Remove and cool.
4. Add oil to a wok or skillet. Add chicken; sauté until it loses its pink color. Break into small morsels. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Cool.
5. Mix together chiles, lime juice, Nam pla, sugar, shallots, and coriander. Add chicken, shrimp, and chilled noodles; mix well.
6. Serve over a bed of shredded lettuce. Garnish with crisp fried shallots (optional).
